title: UFO Fever: How Recent Films and Classics Shape the Alien Genre
description: A detailed look at the resurgence of UFO-themed cinema sparked by recent blockbusters and how classic sci-fi films like Invasion of the Body Snatchers and The UFO Incident continue to influence the genre.

title: 3 Great UFO Movies to Watch After ‘Disclosure Day’: ‘Nope,’ ‘Fire in the Sky’ and More
description: Steven Spielberg is back! After years of making smaller movies that – let’s be honest – didn’t gross as much as they should have, the one-time king of the summer blockbuster reclaimed his throne last weekend with Disclosure Day, a new sci-fi film starring Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor and Colman Domingo that grossed a reported [...]

title: ‘Big Hole’ on the Moon is an Alien Base? New UFO files REVEAL shocking Apollo 16 mission mystery
description: Newly declassified Pentagon UFO files have reignited debate over a possible alien presence on the Moon after a previously secret NASA Apollo 16 briefing surfaced online. The recording references a mysterious 'big hole' near the Van de Graaff crater and includes a startling remark that it 'could be an alien star base.' The 55-minute NASA audio, absent from official Apollo 16 transcripts, is part of a growing archive of released UFO and UAP documents. The revelation has fueled fresh speculation among UFO researchers, conspiracy theorists, and space enthusiasts worldwide.

title: Mystery ‘potato-shaped’ figure hovering over Cheyenne Mountain reported in latest UFO files
description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (KRDO) -- A mysterious figure described as "potato-shaped" hovering over Colorado Springs is reported in the latest UFO files. Five U.S. Army service members reported seeing the object spotted over Cheyenne Mountain on Feb. 15, 2022, while near Fort Carson. They described it as large, oddly shaped, and shimmering white. title: Mysterious orb-like objects revealed in latest UFO files
description: The Pentagon has released a third batch of previously classified records concerning reported UFO encounters, including accounts of colorful, orb-like objects moving mysteriously across the sky. The newly opened files contain dozens of documents, photographs, video clips, and audio recordings gathered from multiple government agencies, along with eyewitness testimony describing unexplained sightings.
